releaseNotes: Nexora V2: The Ultimate Command Center upgrade! 🚀
Deep Optimization: Faster loading, smoother 60fps animations, and zero-latency data sync.
Notification Revamp: Enhanced background reminder engine with timezone awareness.
Stable Bio-Scans: Improved scrolling and readability for all your habit insights.
Space House Ready: The legendary level 5 expansion is now fully stabilized!
